summary: Web app with admin login (passcode: sastra2026) and player management features, deployed on Internet Computer (IC) canisters.
architectural_notes: Deployed on Internet Computer (IC) canisters; canister must be running for app to function
known_issues: IC canister stopping (IC0508 error) causes login/backend failures; requires canister restart or redeploy

existing_features.title: On the Admin Login page, when a backend/canister error occurs (such as IC0508 or replica rejection), display a user-friendly error message such as 'Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again.' instead of the raw rejection error text.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update the admin passcode in the backend to 'sastra2026'. The hardcoded admin passcode used in the adminLogin function must be changed to 'sastra2026' so that login succeeds with that value.

Ensure the backend actor initializes and starts correctly on deployment so it does not enter a stopped state (IC0508). The actor must be self-contained, have no blocking pre-upgrade hooks that prevent startup, and handle upgrade gracefully to avoid the canister being left in a stopped state.
